Video.summary: Two people set out into the desert in search of the lost Pegleg gold mine.
Video.title: The Lost Pegleg Mine

Video.summary: Two rival restaurant owners see their competition take a romantic turn.
Video.title: The Rival Hash Houses

Video.summary: Claim jumper Jennie attempts to jump the mining claim of Buck Hansen near Rhyolite, Nevada.
Video.title: Claim Jumpin' Jennie

Video.summary: A young Mormon wife takes drastic measures to cope with life on the prairie.
Video.title: Sego Lilies

Video.summary: A society belle finds herself living in Carson City, Nev., known as Little Washington.
Video.title: Little Washington

Video.summary: A territorial dispute threatens the border town of Aurora and a young couple's love.
Video.title: Which Side of the Fence?

Video.summary: Cavalry man Larry Brooks is escorting a group through peaceful Native territory when threats arise.
Video.title: One in a Hundred

Video.summary: A little girl grows up to become a performer in a vaudeville show.
Video.title: Lotta Crabtree

Video.summary: Jimmy Dayton hopes to win the hand of a gold-digging dance girl.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Treasure

Video.summary: An engineer negotiates a peace treaty with Natives refusing to let a railroad cross their lands.
Video.title: Husband Pro-Tem

Video.summary: Lucretia's family endures years of poverty because her daydreaming husband hates steady work.
Video.title: The Rainbow Chaser

Video.summary: A newspaper man bets his girlfriend's father that he can make a fortune in three days.
Video.title: Mr. Godiva

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: A teacher stages a holdup as a joke but decides to make a career of it.
Video.title: Black Bart The PO8

Video.summary: Two partner prospectors sell out to the wealthy Spencer Gates and their lives take different paths.
Video.title: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Image.alt: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: A tenderfoot becomes a swamper with the Big Team to prove his worth to the girl he loves.
Video.title: The Big Team Rolls

Video.summary: A man must collect back taxes and hires some muscle for assistance, but a surprise awaits him.
Video.title: Death and Taxes

Video.summary: A crystal ball sends the seventh daughter of a seventh daughter West to seek her fortune.
Video.title: The Crystal Gazer

Video.summary: A young bandit is robbing banks and businesses in a sheriff's territory.
Video.title: The Death Valley Kid

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.
Video.title: Land of the Free

Video.summary: A young miner is afflicted with a monumental problem: claustrophobia.
Video.title: Yaller

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: The romance of young lovers is threatened by their feuding families.
Video.title: Halfway Girl

Video.summary: A wife drives a stagecoach to transport silver to Hillsboro after bandits attack her husband.
Video.title: The Saga of Sadie Orchard

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: A set of circumstances prevent friends from keeping control of their potential millions.
Video.title: Ten Day Millionaires

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: Maso and Okei, tea growers in Gold Hills, encounter both friendship and racism from the locals.
Video.title: The Dragon of Gold Hill

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: The Chumash Natives, enslaved by Spanish soldiers in California, rebel against their captors.
Video.title: Let My People Go

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: To avenge his son's death, an embittered rancher sets out to destroy a cowtown.
Video.title: The Oldest Law

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen
